# Generated Code CMakeLists.txt
# Auto-generated by GachBoot ConfigTool
# Project: GachBoot v1.0.0
# Generated: 2025-12-06 22:18:45

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.22)

# Collect all generated sources
set(GENERATED_SOURCES "")

# Add NvM Generated Code
if(EXISTS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/NvM_Gen)
    file(GLOB NVM_GEN_SOURCES 
        "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/NvM_Gen/*.c"
    )
    list(APPEND GENERATED_SOURCES ${NVM_GEN_SOURCES})
    message(STATUS "Added NvM_Gen sources: ${NVM_GEN_SOURCES}")
endif()

# Add DID Generated Code
if(EXISTS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/DID_Gen)
    file(GLOB DID_GEN_SOURCES 
        "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/DID_Gen/*.c"
    )
    list(APPEND GENERATED_SOURCES ${DID_GEN_SOURCES})
    message(STATUS "Added DID_Gen sources: ${DID_GEN_SOURCES}")
endif()

# Create library from generated code
add_library(GenerateCode STATIC ${GENERATED_SOURCES})

# Add include directories (only if folders exist)
if(EXISTS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/NvM_Gen)
    target_include_directories(GenerateCode PUBLIC
        ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/NvM_Gen
    )
endif()

if(EXISTS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/DID_Gen)
    target_include_directories(GenerateCode PUBLIC
        ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/DID_Gen
    )
endif()

# Link dependencies
target_link_libraries(GenerateCode PUBLIC stm32cubemx)
